summary: Frontend testing completed for Landing Page emotional overhaul. All 8 requested features verified working: (1) 14 Pillars 'We Celebrate Life' headline, (2) Emotional descriptions on hover, (3) Farewell tagline, (4) Mira 'She Interprets Lives' positioning, (5) Brain/Concierge division text, (6) Explorer 7-day free trial, (7) Multiple pets note removed, (8) Video testimonial thumbnails match dogs.

14_pillars_emotional_descriptions.details: All 14 pillars have emotion field with hover descriptions

farewell_tagline.details: Farewell tagline shows: 'Even in farewell, we celebrate. Because love never ends.'

mira_headline.details: Mira section shows 'She Doesn't Fulfil Requests. She Interprets Lives.'

verified_text: Mira is the brain. Concierge is the hand.
One understands life. The other moves the world.
Mira is the memory and judgement layer that turns infrastructure into relationship.
